source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for multilingual headings, body text, labels, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Alert-ready 8px product grids, lava-flow separators, basalt panels, incident dashboards, and high-energy volcanic hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent volcano motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an active volcano form, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A compact volcanic cone with basalt black rock, lava orange flow, magma red glow, ash grey slopes, sulfur gold highlights, ember flame cracks, and accurate volcanic island geology.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the crater, lava flow, or base.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves rock texture, glowing lava channels, ash slopes, and sharp silhouette.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no island landscape, no sky, no smoke plume extending out of frame, no decorative background, no second subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Volcano" derived from the visible transparent active volcano cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the lava orange flow, magma red glow, basalt black rock, ash grey slopes, sulfur gold highlights, ember cracks, and volcanic cone geometry in the visible cutout. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme, so token roles and component examples must be clear and readable.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Volcano, Volcano, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics. Show multilingual product UI guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, ash-grey surfaces, lava-flow dividers, basalt rock textures, high-energy incident-system mood.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: ash grey, lava orange, magma red, sulfur gold, ember flame, pumice light, smoke stone, cooled lava, basalt black.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Volcano".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Volcano design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent volcano cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Volcano board as references. Preserve the lava orange, magma red, basalt black, ash grey, and sulfur gold palette roles, incident component language, lava-flow dividers, alert spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme, so dark-mode token roles and component states must be clear.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Volcano, Volcano, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from basalt black and cooled lava, light text from ash grey, primary accents from lava orange, secondary accents from magma red, sulfur gold warning details, restrained high-energy contrast, subtle basalt and lava-crack overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Volcano".
